---
title: "merge_traces.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\merge_traces.py"
loc: 83
complexity: 11
logic_score: 1.72
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 2.36
overall_score: 1.68
---

## Intent
The `merge_traces.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on merge_traces. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via merge_traces. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `merge_traces`
